overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence in Cyberpunk 2077, moving through a waterfront market stall and observing a vendor in a conical hat. The scene transitions from a shaded narrow market passage to an open waterfront with a large red ship, then settles near the vendor overlooking a busy pedestrian street with neon signs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market stall with merchandise displays

events.description: camera begins moving forward through the narrow market stall passage
approaching the open waterfront as the large red ship becomes visible

agents.ego_description: moving through the narrow market stall passage toward the waterfront vendor

entered.detail: metal awning structure providing shade over the market area
green cardboard boxes with white geometric symbols stacked on the ground
wooden shelving unit holding white ceramic vases and pottery
tall illuminated vertical light panel with green glow
massive red and white cargo ship docked at the waterfront

segments.scene_description: The camera moves forward through a narrow covered market stall, passing green boxes and ceramic displays. Sunlight filters through gaps in the metal roofing, and a massive red cargo ship becomes visible in the distance as the camera approaches the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade with docked vessel

events.description: exits the covered stall into the bright open waterfront area
camera turns left to face the market street and vendor stall

agents.ego_description: moving past the vendor counter and turning to face the bustling market street

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing a conical hat standing behind the counter

entered.detail: white concrete counter with decorative items and merchandise displayed
concrete pier extending toward the water with industrial containers
illuminated signage and storefronts along the market street
elevated pedestrian bridge or monorail track with support pillars

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the shaded stall into bright sunlight at the waterfront, revealing the full scale of the red cargo ship. The camera then turns left, passing the vendor in the conical hat, to face the neon-lit market street with its overhead walkway structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: market vendor stall facing pedestrian thoroughfare

events.description: camera stops moving and remains stationary near the vendor counter
vendor interacts with a handheld device while observing the street

agents.ego_description: standing still near the vendor counter watching pedestrians and market activity

notable_agents.action: vendor wearing conical hat occasionally checking a handheld device
pedestrian in pink clothing walking along the market street

entered.detail: bronze decorative dragon sculpture on the counter

segments.scene_description: The camera settles into a stationary position near the vendor stall, overlooking the busy pedestrian market street. The vendor in the conical hat stands behind the counter with a dragon statue and barrels on display, occasionally checking a device while pedestrians in colorful clothing walk past the neon-lit storefronts.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shaded interior of a narrow market passage out into a bright, neon-lit waterfront district. It begins by moving forward through a covered stall past green boxes and ceramic displays, where sunlight filters through gaps in the metal roofing to reveal a massive red cargo ship in the distance. As the camera emerges from the shade into the full glare of the waterfront, the scale of the ship becomes apparent before the view shifts left, passing a vendor in a conical hat to face a bustling market street. The scene then settles into a stationary position overlooking the pedestrian thoroughfare, where the vendor stands behind a counter featuring a dragon statue and barrels. Finally, the camera lingers on the vibrant street scene as pedestrians in colorful clothing walk past glowing neon storefronts beneath an overhead walkway.
